function.name: shell
function.description: Run a bounded shell command inside the assigned workspace.

command.description: Required shell command to run (no default). May return early with status=running/background=true; poll via get_tool_run or wait_run.

cwd.description: Optional workspace-relative working directory. Defaults to '.'.

function.name: compress_context
function.description: Use this when context is long and work has entered a new phase where earlier history can be compacted. Compression removes fine-grained trajectory details, so call it at a clean split point whenever possible. Do not call other tools in the same response as compress_context; use it alone to avoid interference.

function.name: wait_time
function.description: Wait for a bounded number of seconds.

seconds.description: Required wait duration in seconds. Must be >= 10 and <= 60.

function.name: list_mcp_servers
function.description: List enabled MCP servers for the current agent, including connection state and discovered tool/resource counts.

function.name: list_mcp_resources
function.description: List discovered MCP resources across enabled servers. Use this before read_mcp_resource when you need a URI.

server_id.description: Optional MCP server id to restrict the listing to one server.

limit.description: Maximum number of resources to return. Defaults to runtime.tools.list_default_limit and is capped by runtime.tools.list_max_limit.

cursor.description: Optional opaque pagination cursor from a previous list_mcp_resources result.

function.name: read_mcp_resource
function.description: Read one MCP resource by URI. If the URI exists on multiple servers, also provide server_id.

uri.description: Required MCP resource URI to read.

server_id.description: Optional MCP server id when the URI is ambiguous or you want to force one server.

function.name: list_agent_runs
function.description: List agent runs in this session, newest-to-oldest by created_at.

status.description: Optional status filter. Accepts one string or an array of strings; values are matched as-is after normalization.

limit.description: Maximum number of agent runs to return per page. Defaults to runtime.tools.list_default_limit and is capped by runtime.tools.list_max_limit.

cursor.description: Optional opaque pagination cursor from previous list_agent_runs result. Defaults to null (first page).

function.name: get_agent_run
function.description: Get one agent run by agent_id and optionally return a message slice. Messages may be long, so keep fetches minimal.

agent_id.description: Required stable id of the target agent run (prefix: agent-).

messages_start.description: Optional start index for message slice (inclusive). Supports negative indexes from the tail (e.g. -1 means the last message). Omit both slice fields to fetch only the latest message.

messages_end.description: Optional end index for message slice (exclusive, [start,end)). Supports negative indexes from the tail. At most 5 messages are returned per call to avoid waste on long message payloads.

function.name: spawn_agent
function.description: Create one child agent with a concrete instruction. Returns both child_agent_id (agent-*) and tool_run_id (toolrun-*).

name.description: Optional short label for the child agent. Defaults to 'Worker Agent'.

instruction.description: Required specific task for the child agent (no default).

function.name: cancel_agent
function.description: Cancel one descendant child agent by id, recursively by default.

agent_id.description: Required stable descendant agent id to cancel (prefix: agent-).

recursive.description: Optional. When true (default), cancel the whole descendant subtree.

function.name: steer_agent
function.description: Send one message to another agent in the current session. The target may be reactivated if runtime allows it.

agent_id.description: Required target agent id to receive the message (prefix: agent-).

content.description: Required message content to enqueue for the target agent.

function.name: list_tool_runs
function.description: List persisted tool runs in the current session, ordered newest-to-oldest by created_at.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return per page. Defaults to runtime.tools.list_default_limit and is capped by runtime.tools.list_max_limit.

cursor.description: Optional opaque pagination cursor from previous list_tool_runs result. Defaults to null (first page).

function.name: get_tool_run
function.description: Get one tool run by tool_run_id.

tool_run_id.description: Required stable id of the target tool run (prefix: toolrun-).

include_result.description: When true, include full result payload in tool_run. Defaults to false.

function.name: wait_run
function.description: Block until a tool run or agent run reaches the required terminal state.

parameters.description: Provide exactly one of tool_run_id or agent_id. Runtime validates this contract.

function.name: cancel_tool_run
function.description: Cancel one running or queued tool run by tool_run_id.

tool_run_id.description: Required stable id of the target tool run (prefix: toolrun-).

function.name: finish
function.description: Finish the current agent loop with a concise summary payload.

status.description: Required completion state for this agent (no default).

summary.description: Required concise summary of completed work, remaining gaps, and key outcomes (no default).

next_recommendation.description: Worker-only advisory field. Required when worker status is 'partial' or 'failed'; ignored for root.
